testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: I've tried countless supplements for brain fog and nothing worked until Brain Boost 1000. Within two weeks, I noticed a massive difference in my focus and clarity. As someone who values natural products, I love that it's vegan and has no artificial additives.

testimonials.name: James T.
testimonials.text: The stress relief alone is worth it. I'm a software developer and the mental demands are intense. Brain Boost 1000 helps me stay sharp through long coding sessions without the jitters of caffeine.

testimonials.name: Emily R.
testimonials.text: Finally, a supplement that's ARTG listed and actually works! I feel confident knowing it's made in Australia with real quality standards. My memory has improved noticeably in just a month.

stockist.headline: Become a Stockist
stockist.subheadline: Join our growing network of health and wellness retailers across Australia. Apply below and our team will be in touch within 2–3 business days.

footer.about: Neurotonics is Australia's trusted brand for natural cognitive supplements. Our products are ARTG listed, vegan, and free from artificial preservatives and additives.
footer.disclaimer: Always read the label and follow the directions for use. Supplements should not replace a balanced diet. If symptoms persist, talk to your health professional.
